reviews.title: Best Ethical Bank
reviews.body: I was looking for an ethical bank that is transparent about where it invests my money and only invests it into companies and/or projects that are good for the planet and communities, and Ecology came out top. The process of joining was smooth and all done digitally/via photos of paper documents. There are a good range of savings accounts to choose from and although the interest rates aren't market-leading, they aren't bottom of the market either and for me it was more important to be certain that my money is being ethically invested. Transfers are pretty quick and all information is very clearly (if sometimes repetitively) given. Looking at the monthly newsletters, it's clear that they live up to their reputation for ethical, eco-friendly investments, and they really put their money where their mouth is with things like better mortgage deals if you're looking for a more energy efficient home or looking to do an eco retrofit. The only criticism I have is I would really like them to be a bigger company with high street branches, debit cards and an app, so that I could move all of my banking over to them.

reviews.title: All round excellence
reviews.body: 1) the ease of managing my accounts online and2) the very positive attitude of staff when dealing with members3) good interst rates and4) becoming a part of an ethical organisation that contributes to the greater good makes the societya absolute winner

reviews.title: Very good customer service
reviews.body: Very good customer service, straight responsible ethical company I believe in good fair and real communication updates happy with my 7 years with it all.

reviews.title: Great all round
reviews.body: Great service, great products, great ambitions and great ethics. What’s not to like?!

reviews.title: Avoid this Company at all costs
reviews.body: Avoid this Company at all costs. They string you along for months, take ages to reply, then ask for the same paperwork over and over and finally say you've been timed out and you will have to reapply and pay and do it all over again.....

reviews.title: Excellent professional service
reviews.body: I have had a savings account with Ecology Building Society for 3 years now.  I saw it recommended in the Ethical Consumer magazine which impressed me enough.  My brother also recommended them as he has used them a few times over the years, he has his mortgage with them.  I have been really pleased so far, absolutely no regrets, a really good decision to join.

reviews.title: Fabulous truly eco building
reviews.body: I approached Ecology Building society nine years ago for a mortgage to build a Straw bale house and have been with them ever since moving my savings over as well. I love the fact they support people like me to build their dreams in a green and natural way.

reviews.title: I've been saving With Ecology Building…
reviews.body: I've been saving With Ecology Building Society for 40 years. I really like that they were 'green' before it was trendy & they haven't watered down their values. It's great to talk to a real human being on the phone if I need to & the staff have always been friendly & efficient.

reviews.title: Very happy to know my savings are being…
reviews.body: Very happy to know my savings are being used for ethical purposes.

reviews.title: Exceptional values and ethos
reviews.body: Exceptional values and ethos. Great savings rate for Cash ISA. Good customer service. Website needs improving but that sounds like it is on its way. Highly recommend to all.

reviews.title: A good, ethical and safe place for my money
reviews.body: I’ve saved with the Ecology for over 40 years. I like the ethics, and the staff are always helpful.

reviews.title: I have used the savings facilities of…
reviews.body: I have used the savings facilities of the ecological Building Society for 20 years plus and I have always found them very helpful.

reviews.title: No problems
reviews.body: No problems: straightforward online access, decent interest rates

reviews.title: Ecological homes
reviews.body: I'm happy to have some of my savings with the Ecology Building Society, knowing that they are contributing to the construction of homes that are not only ecological but beautiful.

reviews.title: A safe place to invest ethically
reviews.body: Having had savings accounts and ISAs with Ecology for nearly 40 years, I can confirm their reliability. I have no experience of what they are like as a mortgage lender, but, due to their ethical policies, my savings with them did not suffer AT ALL in the 2008 financial crash.

reviews.title: Competitive & good use of money
reviews.body: Competitive rates of interest and comforting to know that our money is being used for good causes.

reviews.title: OVER 40 YEARS AND NOT ONE COMPLAINT
reviews.body: We have been with the Ecology BS nearly since it's Inception over 40 years ago. I cannot understand the negative feedback back, in our view Ecology is a wonderful society, we have never encountered one bad experience with them. Every time we phone it is always a good experience greeted like a friend and not just a number, wonderful advice given. If you want to hang about on the phone for hours to be greeted by a robotic, scripted telesales person so to the big banks for us Ecology is just perfect.

reviews.title: One of the few truly ethical companies…
reviews.body: One of the few truly ethical companies around, including paying all their taxes, and give decent rates rather than gimmicks. Online banking used to be clunky but has improved. With them for many years.

reviews.title: Very poor company
reviews.body: Very poor & very slow! Ny daughter tried to set up an account with Ecology, and ended up not bothering They wanted her to send her passport and driving licence to them in the post as claimed they had not been certified, which she refused to do. Bizarre company with bad practices and what seems like an age to get any sort of reply from them.Avoid and go with a tried and tested bank or building society would be my advice.

reviews.title: Snails move faster
reviews.body: I applied, via my account,for a regular saver. I thought that as an existing member my application would sail through and be avaiable  immediately,or the next day, as is the norm for most building societies. Wrong, after waiting a week I had to phone up to enquire about the application, and was informed it is still sitting on the system and had not been actioned.Worse still, it had not got the electronic signature on it,so when eventually it did get looked at,they would have to send me a form to be signed before going any further,causing further delay. Ecology will have to pull itself into the 21st century if it wants to succeed in selling its products.If I had not got a specific need for this account I would not have bothered going any further with the application.

reviews.title: AVOID!
reviews.body: If you value your sanity avoid this mortgage provider. They state on their website that they will lend to more unusual builds this is not true. They are the most incompetent company I have ever had the misfortune come across. They take at least 14 days to answer emails, loose emails, employ incompetent surveyors and string you along for months only to decline on a technicality that was not even correct. Do yourself a favour and save yourself a lot of stress and anxiety and find another company. Would have given then no stars

reviews.title: Do not waste your time on that company
reviews.body: Do not waste your time on that company. They will not lend you any money after 2 months of misleading process/informations.

reviews.title: Terrible interraction
reviews.body: I called and the individual who answered can across incredibly entitled. Throwing acronyms at me which I had to request a definition for. When I asked for self build requirements, I was asked almost immediately whether I was a British citizen. Sure, I may have an accent but really is this the way you provide requirements? I left the call feeling dismissed and angry and none the wiser whether this was pure discrimination or whether they actually couldn’t provide the service for my circumstances. Insulting, and on principle I would avoid.

reviews.title: Great service
reviews.body: Great service, isa transfer processed in three days.

reviews.title: Ethical saving made simple
reviews.body: Setting up a new bank account can be complex with User IDs, passwords, memorable phrases etc etc.I got a bit stuck when I first tried to log in when setting things up, but the phoneline help person was excellent with calm clear instructions. I got talked through my difficulty and things have run smoothly since. The website is uncluttered and easy to read.Altogether this is ethical saving made simple.

reviews.title: Pioneered sustainable development since 1980s.
reviews.body: I have saved with them for most of my life.  If there is a problem and you have to call, you feel you are talking to a real person with fast and sensible responses.  Their newsletter always has interesting stuff about their current customers' interesting ethical/sustainable building and housing projects, covering innovative ideas and developments in green building. I bear this in mind when considering the middling rates of interest they pay. I see saving with them as a way of showing support for  sustainable development that really gets built.

reviews.title: Fast and Easy (savings account)
reviews.body: Opened a savings account, all handled online with very little hassle, could even sign the documents without having to print them off. Opened and moved my savings across in less than 24h, all with a decent interest rate and an ethical investment portfolio. Happy customer, will probably encourage family members to make the switch too.

reviews.title: Opened a regular saver
reviews.body: Opened a regular saver. Process was straightforward. Had to ring a couple of times for information etc. Phone was answered quickly and query very efficiently dealt with in a friendly and professional manner. Excellent for a small building society

reviews.title: First impressions not good far too many…
reviews.body: First impressions not good far too many Id passwords info and key code just to log in. direct debit to set up an ecology account seemsyou have to download form fill post costtime to do choremoney electricity for computerdoes not seem very user friendlyhad about 7 emails from them none had account number they say you can find that on log in but if log in keeps failing as have spent 90 mins on this todayNot much fun hope they read this and offer a good will gesture for anxiety and stress caused.

reviews.title: Terrible
reviews.body: Terrible. Enquiry form not responded to, and attitude of call handler was terrible.
